plugins.name: hello-plugin
plugins.description: A tiny demo plugin that greets you.
plugins.intro: A minimal plugin used to demonstrate how entry.yaml enriches native data.

skills.name: greet
skills.description: Greets the user warmly. Use when someone says hello or wants a greeting.
skills.trigger: When you want a friendly greeting in a demo.

tips.text: This whole plugin exists only to illustrate the manifest shape.
